facebook.content:
Prayer Focus: Family

As we seek to build strong families that honor God, let's declare His truth and provision over our homes.

"May the Lord bless you and keep you; the Lord make his face shine on you and be gracious to you; the Lord turn his face toward you and give you peace" (Numbers 6:24-26). 

We pray that every family within IFM's community will experience the blessings of God's presence in their lives, providing stability, love, and unity.

#IFM #KingdomLiving #KingdomPrayer

instagram.content:
Praying for our Nations' Leaders

As we pray for those in authority, let us remember that our Lord is the ultimate King. 1 Timothy 2:2

"Lord, raise up leaders who fear You and govern justly. Give them Your wisdom, Your discernment, and Your heart. May Your kingdom be established in our nation, and may Your will be done on earth as it is in heaven."
instagram.cta: Submit your prayer request → Link in bio

tiktok.content:
"Family Prayer Focus
As we prioritize our relationships, let's pray for our families to be blessed with unity and purpose.
'Lord, ignite a fire of love and respect within our homes, that Your kingdom may flourish through our families.
